evals.prompt: Set up prompt capture for this project. Verify that repeated identical human prompts remain separate, API keys are redacted, a sent PNG is archived privately, and an attached PDF only contributes its parseable path.
evals.expected_output: A private .prompt-harness ledger is initialized, live hook records pass doctor, repeated submissions produce separate events, secrets are redacted, the PNG is content-addressed and embedded in PROMPTS.md, and the PDF body is not copied.

evals.prompt: Backfill all Claude Code and Codex prompts for this project, but do not count Claude branch copies or the Claude rows mirrored into an imported Codex task.
evals.expected_output: The recovery report distinguishes native Claude, native Codex continuation prompts, excluded mirrors, merged branch references, and a passing doctor result.

evals.prompt: Find every human prompt about major revision in this project and give me the generated Markdown archive path so it can later seed a badcase analysis.
evals.expected_output: Search results come from canonical human-prompt events, the Markdown index is rebuilt, and stable event IDs are available for future badcase links.

evals.prompt: In an old Codex task, test whether this prompt is captured automatically. Do not run backfill. After the assistant finishes, report event_id, source.mode, platform, model, and image count.
evals.expected_output: The check accounts for post-turn Stop timing, reports stop_recovery metadata, and confirms that the same interaction schedules full-project automatic reconciliation without manual backfill.

evals.prompt: Backfill a Claude base64 PNG and a Codex data-URL JPEG into a ledger that already contains both prompt events, then run it twice.
evals.expected_output: No prompt events are rewritten or duplicated; missing image relations are appended once, content-addressed assets are reused, PROMPTS.md embeds both images, and doctor passes.

evals.prompt: Archive an image-only user turn containing a remote HTTPS image, an SVG, and a valid local PNG.
evals.expected_output: The empty-text prompt event is retained, only the validated local PNG is stored, remote/SVG inputs are omitted with diagnostic records, no network fetch occurs, and doctor reports the omissions as warnings rather than corrupting the ledger.

evals.prompt: I opened an existing project in a brand-new Codex task and sent one prompt. There is no .prompt-harness yet. Make this one interaction create it and automatically recover every Claude and Codex user prompt and image for the project without delaying the assistant response.
evals.expected_output: The current prompt is captured synchronously, the project ledger is initialized, a detached auto-sync runs all-platform reconciliation, state/auto-sync.json records completion, and project-level locking prevents overlapping scans.

evals.prompt: Resume an old task in a project whose ledger already exists. Fill every missing prompt, but do not duplicate a legacy image prompt that used to contain an image-attachment-omitted marker.
evals.expected_output: The resumed task triggers Stop or submission capture plus session-aware auto-sync, historical identity matches precede text hashes, images attach once, and any already-created legacy duplicate is hidden by an append-only supersession relation rather than deleted.

evals.prompt: My archive currently labels two prompts P00001 and P00002. Backfill a genuinely older prompt and rebuild every derived view without changing any canonical event identity.
evals.expected_output: The older prompt becomes P00001, the prior prompts move to P00002 and P00003 in chronological order, every event_id remains unchanged, and Markdown, search output, and timeline details expose both the current P number and stable event_id.
